title: WTW to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year Earnings on February 9, 2023
text: LONDON, Jan. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (Willis Towers Watson, NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company, will announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year on Thursday, February 9, 2023 before the market opens.
